prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Harrop HTV 2650 TVS supercharger kit (replacing the stock Eaton TVS2300) on the 5.0L AJ-V8 Gen III SC (engine code: PT204) with a custom pulley system (75mm ATI Super Damper + 2.75" overdrive pulley) to push boost levels to 12-14 psi, paired with a custom fuel system upgrade including dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator for sustained 800+ hp on E85

Full exhaust overhaul with a custom 3.5" titanium exhaust system by Armytrix (valvetronic bypass) featuring quad 102mm outlets, paired with a custom X-pipe and secondary cat delete (replaced with GESI high-flow metallic core cats) to optimize scavenging and reduce backpressure for the AJ-V8’s cross-plane crankshaft dynamics

Suspension and handling transformation with a full KW Automotive Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable, 80mm of travel) paired with Eibach ERS race springs (25% stiffer than OEM), custom poly bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer) for the front control arms and rear subframe, and a Tractive Active Suspension (TAS) hydraulic lift system for 50mm of adjustable ride height
estetica: Custom widebody conversion kit by Prior Design (PD800RR) featuring carbon fiber fender flares (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) with integrated air vents for brake cooling, paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) for aggressive aero balance

Full carbon fiber exterior overhaul including a 1-piece carbon fiber hood (with functional heat extractor vents) by RK Sport, carbon fiber side skirts by Liberty Walk (LB-SUV kit), and a custom carbon fiber roof panel (replacing the OEM aluminum) to reduce weight by 35kg while maintaining structural rigidity

Interior transformation with a full Alcantara and carbon fiber retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a custom 380mm MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel (flat-bottom, Alcantara with carbon fiber inserts), Recaro SPG XL front seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara bolsters), and a custom rear seat delete (replaced with a carbon fiber storage cage for spare tires or luggage)
